quality.notes: The description is comprehensive and directly maps to established D&D 5e item mechanics.

mechanics.primary_effect: Maximizes weapon damage dice against objects.
mechanics.critical_hit_effect: Extra 4d6 slashing damage upon rolling a natural 20, followed by a second d20 roll to attempt to sever a limb (GM's discretion on effect).
mechanics.utility_effect: Light source activation via command word (10ft bright, 10ft dim).

improvement_suggestions: Standardize rarity formatting to match other entries if this is part of a larger dataset (e.g., always use title case 'Very Rare').
